findings.description: Dashboard shows revenue chart as a pie chart, but PRD specifies a stacked bar chart for monthly revenue breakdown.

quotes.prd: The revenue overview SHALL display a stacked bar chart showing monthly revenue by project category.

findings.recommendation: Replace pie chart component with stacked bar chart as specified in PRD FR-7.

findings.description: Login form uses email-only authentication, but PRD requires SSO + email/password dual option.

quotes.prd: Users SHALL authenticate via SSO (SAML 2.0) or email/password. Both options visible on login screen.

findings.recommendation: Add SSO button alongside existing email/password form per FR-1.

findings.description: Team directory uses card layout, but PRD specifies a sortable table with columns for Name, Role, Department, Utilization.

quotes.prd: Team directory SHALL display a sortable data table with columns: Name, Role, Department, Current Project, Utilization %.

findings.recommendation: Replace card grid with sortable data table as defined in FR-22.

findings.description: Export to CSV button is absent from team directory wireframe. PRD FR-24 requires bulk export.

quotes.prd: Users SHALL be able to export filtered team data to CSV format.

findings.recommendation: Add export CSV button to team directory toolbar.

findings.description: Project detail page missing milestone timeline. PRD FR-14 defines milestone tracking with Gantt-style visualization.

quotes.prd: Each project detail page SHALL include a milestone timeline showing key dates, dependencies, and completion status.

findings.recommendation: Add milestone timeline section to project detail page.

findings.description: Dashboard missing notification bell icon. PRD FR-5 requires real-time notification center.

quotes.prd: Dashboard header SHALL include a notification icon with unread count badge.

findings.recommendation: Add notification bell to dashboard header.

findings.description: Search bar placeholder text says 'Search' but PRD specifies 'Search projects, people, or resources...' as placeholder.

quotes.prd: Global search input placeholder: 'Search projects, people, or resources...'

findings.recommendation: Update placeholder text to match PRD specification.

findings.description: Dashboard includes a 'Quick Actions' floating button (FAB) not defined in PRD.
findings.recommendation: Validate with product team whether Quick Actions FAB should be added to PRD.

findings.description: Login page includes 'Remember me' checkbox not mentioned in PRD.
findings.recommendation: Document in PRD or remove from wireframe.

findings.description: Primary button uses #2563eb but UX design system defines primary color as #3b82f6.

quotes.ux: --color-primary: #3b82f6; Applied to all primary action buttons.

findings.recommendation: Update button color from #2563eb to #3b82f6.

findings.description: Card border-radius is 12px but UX defines --radius-card as 8px.

quotes.ux: --radius-card: 8px; Standard radius for all card containers.

findings.recommendation: Change card border-radius from 12px to 8px.

findings.description: Sidebar background uses #1a1a2e but UX defines --color-surface-dark as #1e293b.

quotes.ux: --color-surface-dark: #1e293b; Used for sidebar and dark panels.

findings.recommendation: Update sidebar background from #1a1a2e to #1e293b.

findings.description: Page headings use font-weight 800 but UX type scale defines heading weight as 600 (semi-bold).

quotes.ux: Heading 1: Inter, 600 weight, 32px/40px. Heading 2: Inter, 600 weight, 24px/32px.

findings.recommendation: Reduce heading font-weight from 800 to 600.

findings.description: DataTable component missing sortable column headers. UX spec defines sort indicators (chevron up/down) on all sortable columns.

quotes.ux: DataTable: All columns sortable by default. Sort indicator: chevron-up (ascending), chevron-down (descending), both dimmed (unsorted).

findings.recommendation: Add sort indicators to DataTable column headers.

findings.description: Avatar component shows square shape but UX defines Avatar as circular with 2px border.
findings.recommendation: Change Avatar to circular shape with 2px border.

findings.description: Dashboard uses 2-column grid but UX defines a 3-column layout for the metrics section.

quotes.ux: Dashboard metrics: 3-column grid, gap: 24px, each card min-width: 280px.

findings.recommendation: Change metrics section from 2 columns to 3 columns.

findings.description: Content area padding is 16px but UX defines 32px padding for main content region.

quotes.ux: Main content area: padding: 32px, max-width: 1280px, centered.

findings.recommendation: Increase content padding from 16px to 32px.

findings.description: Button hover state shows no visual change. UX defines hover: background darkens 10%, subtle shadow appears.

quotes.ux: Primary Button hover: background-color: darken(--color-primary, 10%), box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15), transition: all 150ms ease.

findings.recommendation: Add hover state transition to primary buttons.

findings.description: At 768px breakpoint, sidebar does not collapse to hamburger menu as UX spec requires.

quotes.ux: Breakpoint md (768px): sidebar collapses to hamburger icon in top bar. Main content fills full width.

findings.recommendation: Implement sidebar collapse behavior at 768px breakpoint.

findings.description: Project detail page includes a 'Recent Activity' feed widget not defined in UX component registry or PRD.
findings.recommendation: Document this component in UX design system or remove from wireframe.

findings.description: Breadcrumb navigation defined in UX is completely absent from all wireframe pages.

quotes.ux: Breadcrumb: present on all pages except Login. Pattern: Home > Section > Current Page. Uses --color-text-secondary, '/' separator.

findings.recommendation: Add breadcrumb navigation to all interior pages.

findings.description: Empty state illustrations defined in UX for DataTable and project list are missing. Wireframe shows blank space.

quotes.ux: EmptyState component: centered illustration (from asset library), heading, description text, primary action button. Applied to: DataTable (no rows), ProjectList (no projects).

findings.recommendation: Implement EmptyState component for all data-dependent areas.

findings.description: PRD says project status uses 4 values (Active, Paused, Completed, Archived) but UX defines 5 status variants (adds 'Draft').

quotes.prd: Project status: Active | Paused | Completed | Archived
quotes.ux: StatusBadge variants: Draft (gray), Active (green), Paused (amber), Completed (blue), Archived (slate)

findings.recommendation: Align PRD and UX on project status values. Wireframe currently shows 5 statuses matching UX.
